title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: Get up and running with Llama 3.2, Mistral, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, push, list, delete models via simple API.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same generate/chat/embed API as Python.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use any Ollama model as an LLM or embedding provider in LangChain apps.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-style); chat history, model management, multi-user, RAG uploads.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive TUI for Ollama written in Go; browse, pull, chat, manage models without leaving the terminal.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot chat sidebar.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG example using Ollama embeddings + llama.cpp for retrieval; ingest PDFs, ask questions.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; sync/async APIs, chat, generate, pull, list, embeddings, tool use.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack NLP pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with async streaming, chat, vision, embeddings, tool calls; NuGet package.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection, PVC, ingress, autoscaling.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: n8n community node to call Ollama chat/completion inside no-code workflows.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing async/sync wrappers for the Ollama REST API; chat, generate, pull, embeddings.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger SDK module that wraps Ollama for CI pipelines: test prompts, benchmark models in containers.
